meaning: adv.平平地,水平地,无力气地
examples: He flatly refused to discuss it.
He flatly refused to discuss the matter.
I flatly refused to spend any more time helping him.
" His lawyer Sabrina Shroff said he "flatly denies the accusations in the indictment.
The State Department flatly rejected GOP accusations it attempted to prevent would-be "whistleblowers" from speaking out.
